title: MTrolling
description: A fully configurable troll plugin with a huge variety of troll features for funny and chaotic moments on your server.
body:
# MTrolling

MTrolling brings a huge collection of funny and creative troll features to your Minecraft server!

Whether for SMPs, community servers, events, or just having fun with friends — MTrolling allows you to troll other players in the craziest ways possible.

The plugin offers a large variety of different trolls, modern GUIs, and easy handling for administrators and moderators.

## Features

* Huge selection of troll features
* Troll players in funny ways
* Modern GUI system
* Fully configurable
* Performance optimized
* No watermarks
* Easy to use
* Customizable messages and settings
* Stable and efficient code
* Regular expansion possibilities

## Possible Trolls

* Fake TNT
* Lightning effects
* Confusion effects
* Fake kicks
* Inventory trolls
* Sounds & noises
* Visual effects
* Movement trolls
* And many more funny features

## Why MTrolling?

* Perfect for SMPs and community servers
* Huge variety of trolls
* Modern and user-friendly design
* Lightweight and performant
* Easily expandable
* Optimized for modern Minecraft versions

## Use Cases

* Community events
* SMP fun
* YouTube content
* Stream entertainment
* Trolling friends
* Admin fun features

## Support

Website:
https://mplugins.net

Discord:
https://dc.mplugins.net

If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to join the Discord!
